description_long: This is a short, rustic wooden fence composed of four vertical posts connected by two unevenly aligned horizontal rails. The rails are attached to the posts with visible round metal fasteners, giving the fence a rugged, hand-built appearance. The wood is a warm brown color, and the rails are slightly offset, creating a staggered, irregular pattern. The posts are rectangular in cross-section and have flat tops with no decorative caps. The overall construction suggests a simple, utilitarian design, suitable for marking boundaries in parks, gardens, or along urban walkways. There are no ornamental features or gates integrated into the structure.
description: A short, rustic wooden fence with four posts and two staggered horizontal rails, fastened with visible metal bolts.
description_view_0: Front view showing four vertical posts and two uneven horizontal rails with visible metal fasteners.
description_view_1: Side view showing the thin profile of the fence, with rails and posts aligned in a single plane.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the same four posts and two rails, but with less visible detail on the fasteners.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and alignment of the rails and posts.
